narratives.Overview: Scaffold the Next.js + TypeScript application and wire up the quality gates so every later scope lands on rails: linting, type-checking, unit tests with coverage, and the task check entrypoint.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Next.js (App Router) + TypeScript project scaffolded at the repo root. FR-2: `task check` runs lint, typecheck, and the test suite with coverage in one command. FR-3: Test runner configured for headless unit testing of pure-logic modules. NFR-1: Coverage gate enforced at >= 85% overall and per-module. NFR-2: `task check` passes on a clean scaffold.

items.title: Configure lint + typecheck + test runner with coverage
Wire task check and verify green baseline
